meta.mission: Cartographie concurrentielle MYNε — Marchés de données & Économie de l'intention
meta.myne_positionnement: MYNε est le seul protocole combinant : (1) Agent fiduciaire légal au service de l'individu, (2) Blockchain multi-chain pour tokenisation des données, (3) Privacy avancée (differential privacy + ZK), (4) Corridor Afrique-EU natif avec traçabilité CRMA, (5) Intégration EIGEN (ÆLYA compliance, BURHAN traçabilité, NOOS gouvernance, RAQIB intelligence), (6) Économie de l'intention (pas seulement de l'attention), (7) Revenue model hybride (token + SaaS + transaction %). Aucun concurrent ne couvre plus de 3 de ces 7 dimensions.

concurrents.type_donnees: financial
concurrents.pricing: Subscription-based; specific pricing not publicly disclosed
concurrents.forces: Leading provider of comprehensive financial market data, analytics, and infrastructure serving 40,000+ clients globally with high reliability and real-time insights. Strong integration with LSEG enhances scale and innovation in data ecosystems.
concurrents.faiblesses: High debt from acquisitions and integration challenges post-LSEG merger; faces intense competition from Bloomberg and others in data provision.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: LSEG reports strong 2025 results with 7.1% income growth, advancing AI-ready data partnerships (Microsoft, Anthropic); announces £3B share buyback and Workspace enhancements. Refinitiv brand fully retired, integrated into LSEG Data & Analytics.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε démocratise l'accès aux données via tokenisation et gouvernance collective, là où Refinitiv est un oligopole financier à $20k+/an qui exclut 99% du marché.

concurrents.type_donnees: financial, health, geospatial, industrial, IoT
concurrents.pricing: per dataset subscription set by providers; AWS fees: $0.04167 per active data grant hour (US East Ohio), storage $0.023/GB-month, 3% fulfillment fee
concurrents.forces: Integrated AWS-native data marketplace with 3500+ datasets from 300+ providers, seamless delivery via files/APIs/Redshift/S3, consolidated billing. Backed by AWS infrastructure for security, scalability, and low-latency access to third-party data.
concurrents.faiblesses: Dependent on third-party providers for data quality and coverage; additional AWS service costs for storage/querying; limited to AWS ecosystem.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: AWS continues global expansion supporting Data Exchange access; re:Invent 2025 announcements enhanced analytics/ML integrations; parent AWS plans $200B capex in 2026 mostly for data centers including Africa expansions like Kenya Direct Connect (Sep 2025).
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε est un protocole souverain avec privacy-by-design et corridor africain natif, là où AWS est un intermédiaire centralisé qui extrait la valeur vers Seattle.
concurrents.sources: [AWS Data Exchange Announcement](https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2019/11/introducing-aws-data-exchange/), [Celent Report](https://www.celent.com/insights/618835403), [AWS Pricing](https://aws.amazon.com/data-exchange/pricing/), [AWS Docs Data Protection](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/data-exchange/latest/userguide/data-protection.html), [AWS Marketing Entities](https://aws.amazon.com/legal/marketingentities/), [AWS Africa](https://aws.amazon.com/local/africa/), [AWS re:Invent 2025](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/aws/top-announcements-of-aws-reinvent-2025/), [Amazon Capex 2026](https://www.industrialinfo.com/news/article/amazon-boosts-2026-capex-to-200-billion-amid-data-center-surge--353118)

concurrents.type_donnees: financial, industrial
concurrents.pricing: $20k-$30k/user/year or team-based
concurrents.forces: Comprehensive financial/private data, AI tools, user-friendly for governance/private cos.
concurrents.faiblesses: High cost, no trading/messaging, limited Mac support.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: 2026 AI enhancements (ProntoNLP/Drift AI), data expansions; 2025 Document Intelligence 2.0/ChatIQ.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε combine souveraineté des données, agent fiduciaire et corridor africain dans un protocole ouvert, là où S&P est un silo fermé de données financières sans innovation structurelle.

concurrents.type_donnees: Industrial, non-personal, business data across 20+ sectors
concurrents.blockchain: Yes, Ethereum (for smart contracts and decentralized data exchange)
concurrents.pricing: Customizable (subscription, per dataset, configurable pricing; specific numbers not public)
concurrents.forces: Leader in secure, compliant data exchange technology powering industry data spaces like Decade-X for aerospace; white-label platform supports diverse ecosystems with strong governance and interoperability.
concurrents.faiblesses: Limited transparency on recent funding post-2019 and specific pricing; primarily Europe-focused with modest global expansion.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Selected for Decade-X France project (Aug 2025) to power aerospace & defense data ecosystem; compliant with upcoming EU Trusted Data Transaction standard (2026).
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε intègre un agent fiduciaire + corridor Afrique-EU + économie de l'intention dans un protocole unique, là où Dawex ne fait que de l'échange B2B industriel sans souveraineté individuelle.

concurrents.type_donnees: Geospatial, financial, transaction, consumer, AI training, healthcare, environmental, real estate, B2B, HR, risk, telecom, weather, trade, market research, population, web, mobile app, legal, entertainment, energy, automotive, hospitality/travel/tourism
concurrents.corridor_afrique: Present (via providers covering emerging markets including Africa)
concurrents.pricing: Free for buyers; providers pay commission on sales; specific dataset pricing varies by provider
concurrents.forces: Largest global B2B data marketplace with 500+ providers, 560+ categories, free samples/previews, and expert sourcing advice enabling easy data discovery.[Datarade.ai](https://datarade.ai/)
concurrents.faiblesses: Limited transparency on own funding/valuation; relies on provider compliance for data privacy and quality.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Hosted Monda Data & AI Summit 2025 in Berlin (Aug 28); active newsletter 'Datarade Pulse' highlighting new providers and AI/data news in 2025; continued growth with new providers like 1datapipe covering Africa.[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/datarade/), [Substack July 2025](https://datarade.substack.com/p/the-datarade-pulse-july-25-openai)
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε crée un marché de données où l'individu est le bénéficiaire principal via agent fiduciaire, là où Datarade n'est qu'un annuaire de datasets B2B sans mécanisme de consentement.

concurrents.type_donnees: financial (alternative assets: private equity, venture capital, hedge funds, private debt, real estate, infrastructure, natural resources)
concurrents.pricing: Annual subscriptions $20k-$250k+ depending on users, asset classes, API access
concurrents.forces: Industry-leading comprehensive data on private markets with 20+ years expertise; integrated with BlackRock's Aladdin platform post-2025 acquisition.
concurrents.faiblesses: High pricing may limit access for smaller firms; no physical presence in Africa limits regional insights.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: BlackRock completed acquisition in March 2025 for $3.2B; released 2025 Global Reports on private markets trends and 'The Best of Preqin: 2025' in early 2026 highlighting AI, infrastructure, liquidity solutions.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε construit un marché de données inclusif avec gouvernance NOOS et traçabilité BURHAN, là où Preqin est un data vendor opaque réservé au private equity occidental.

concurrents.funding_total: Public company; recent privatization via acquisition for $4.1B equity ($7.7B enterprise value including debt) by Clearlake Capital in 2025
concurrents.type_donnees: financial, industrial
concurrents.blockchain: Tested Ethereum in 2017 for secure data distribution; no current production use noted
concurrents.pricing: Subscription-based; specific pricing not publicly detailed, API access via tiers
concurrents.forces: Largest commercial database (500M+ records); trusted for 180+ years in risk management, credit scoring, supply chain analytics.[Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dun_%26_Bradstreet), [D&B](https://www.dnb.com)
concurrents.faiblesses: Slow growth, perpetual turnaround mode; regulatory issues with FTC settlements in 2025 over subscription practices.[Clark Street Value](http://clarkstreetvalue.blogspot.com/2025/03/dun-bradstreet-strategic-process.html), [FTC](https://www.ftc.gov/news-events/news/press-releases/2025/09/dun-bradstreet-agrees-pay-57-million-resolve-alleged-violations-ftc-order)
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Acquired by Clearlake Capital for $7.7B (Aug 2025); FTC $5.7M settlement (Sep 2025); Launched D&B.AI (Oct 2025).[Clearlake](https://clearlake.com/news/clearlake-completes-acquisition-of-dun-bradstreet/), [FTC](https://www.ftc.gov/news-events/news/press-releases/2025/09/dun-bradstreet-agrees-pay-57-million-resolve-alleged-violations-ftc-order), [D&B PR](https://www.dnb.com/en-us/newsroom/press-releases.html)
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε est structurellement supérieur car il combine privacy avancée + blockchain + agent fiduciaire + corridor Afrique dans un protocole ouvert, là où D&B est un data broker centralisé du 20ème siècle sans innovation architecturale.

concurrents.type_donnees: Industrial, financial, transactional, behavioral, market data, AI/ML datasets
concurrents.pricing: Provider-defined: usage-based (per query e.g. $0.01, monthly fee, events), subscription (upfront 1-36 months); Snowflake compute/storage separate
concurrents.forces: Seamless live data sharing without copying, integrated monetization simplifies sales/procurement, multi-cloud scalability with strong AI Data Cloud adoption.
concurrents.faiblesses: Relies on provider compliance for data privacy, potential high costs for heavy compute usage, dependency on Snowflake platform limits portability.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Jan 2026: Agreement to acquire Observe (AI observability). Feb 2026: Q4 FY2026 product revenue $1.23B (30% YoY), full-year $4.72B. Sep 2025: AWS deployment in South Africa (Cape Town).
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε remet la propriété des données aux individus via un agent fiduciaire blockchain, là où Snowflake centralise et monétise les données au profit des entreprises sans aucun retour à l'utilisateur.

concurrents.type_donnees: industrial, financial
concurrents.pricing: Pro $49-99/user/month; Business starting $199/month; Enterprise custom (e.g. $50k+/year)
concurrents.forces: Comprehensive database of private company data with AI predictions; Large user base and partnerships enhance data quality.
concurrents.faiblesses: Data breach in Jan 2026 exposed millions of records; Relies on crowdsourced data which may have accuracy issues.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: 2025: Partnerships with Perplexity and Databricks; 5,000+ AI predictions confirmed. 2026: Data breach by ShinyHunters claiming 2M+ records stolen.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε tokenise et valorise les données d'intention en temps réel via blockchain, là où Crunchbase ne fait que vendre des fiches statiques d'entreprises en mode SaaS classique.

concurrents.type_donnees: financial (reference, pricing, regulatory, ESG, alternative)
concurrents.pricing: Custom enterprise licenses; Terminal $24-27k/user/yr; data feeds $10k-100k+/yr
concurrents.forces: Unmatched financial data depth (200B+ pts/day), enterprise integration, institutional trust
concurrents.faiblesses: High costs limit to large firms; opaque financials as private co
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Jan 2026: Alt data entitlements in ALTD; Feb 2026: On-chain data w/ Kaiko; 2025 summits & 2026 data trends insights
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε ouvre l'économie des données aux individus et PME du corridor Afrique-EU, là où Bloomberg est un mur payant à $25k/an réservé aux institutions financières occidentales.

concurrents.type_donnees: personal data, big data, AI models, datasets (JSON, binary, images), computing power
concurrents.privacy: confidential computing with TEEs (SGX, TDX), hardware-based encryption
concurrents.pricing: per execution in nRLC (e.g., 1 RLC = 1e9 nRLC; app/data/worker fees set by providers)
concurrents.forces: Pioneering decentralized confidential computing with TEEs and blockchain; strong partnerships (Intel, NVIDIA); enables privacy-preserving AI and DeFi.
concurrents.faiblesses: Low token liquidity and exchange delistings; niche adoption limited by complexity of confidential computing tech.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: 2025: 1M RLC ecosystem fund, 2025 roadmap focusing on AI/TEE expansion, partnerships (NVIDIA, Intel); 2026: Roadmap for privacy-first DeFi, Arbitrum deployment, Confidential Token launch.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε est un marketplace de données souveraines avec agent fiduciaire et corridor Afrique-EU, là où iExec est un protocole de calcul décentralisé qui ne résout pas la propriété des données.

concurrents.funding_total: $5M (pre-merger VC rounds); additional token allocations via grants (~$140M at 2021 prices)
concurrents.valorisation: Market cap ~$170M (2024 data); post-ASI split independent token trading
concurrents.type_donnees: Personal, industrial, financial, health, geospatial, IoT, big data for AI
concurrents.privacy: Compute-to-Data (remote computation without data leaving premises), encryption, access controls, GDPR/HIPAA compliant
concurrents.blockchain: Multi-chain: Ethereum, Polygon, BSC, Moonriver, Optimism, others
concurrents.revenue_model: Token (OCEAN for transactions, staking, curation); transaction fees on data sales
concurrents.pricing: Dynamic via bonding curves/datatokens; per access/query via OCEAN tokens (~$0.13/token as of Apr 2026); no fixed $ pricing
concurrents.forces: Pioneering decentralized data economy for AI with strong privacy via C2D; multi-chain support and active developer tools.
concurrents.faiblesses: Recent drama from ASI Alliance exit and lawsuits alleging token mismanagement; low token market cap signals adoption challenges.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Exited ASI Alliance in Oct 2025 amid disputes, refocusing on data infra; partnerships for GPU compute (NetMind AI, Aethir); class action lawsuit in Feb 2026 by ASI members alleging fraud.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε combine agent fiduciaire, corridor Afrique-EU et intégration EIGEN (compliance ÆLYA + traçabilité BURHAN), là où Ocean Protocol n'a que du Compute-to-Data sans go-to-market ni présence africaine.

concurrents.type_donnees: Personal data, IoT, wearables, smart homes, social networks
concurrents.privacy: Encryption (AES256-GCM, ECDSA), zero-knowledge proofs, proxy re-encryption, data owner control
concurrents.blockchain: Ethereum (DAT ERC20), Datum Blockchain (Ethereum fork), BigchainDB, IPFS
concurrents.pricing: $5 USD per GB per node per month (interim); DAT token fees for storage/trading
concurrents.forces: Enables user-controlled data monetization with strong privacy via blockchain; decentralized storage reduces central risks.
concurrents.faiblesses: Project appears inactive since ~2018 with no recent developments; low token value indicates limited adoption.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: No significant news or developments for Datum Network in 2025-2026; last major activities around 2018 mainnet launch.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε est opérationnel et intégré dans l'écosystème EIGEN, là où Datum est un projet mort depuis 2018 qui n'a jamais dépassé le stade du whitepaper.

concurrents.funding_total: Undisclosed (AFD core MVP + World Bank/GPSDD/SDSN; Flowminder: AFD + Hewlett Foundation)
concurrents.type_donnees: Anonymized personal mobile CDR (mobility, population, poverty), geospatial
concurrents.privacy: Privacy-preserving (send code to data, aggregated stats, GDPR, ethics committees)
concurrents.agent_fiduciaire: Participatory governance via CODE ethics committees and advisory board; Flowminder data processor
concurrents.pricing: Not specified (free historical, paid recent data)
concurrents.forces: Pioneering secure big data access for social good with strong partnerships and open-source tools. Scalable 'code to data' model builds trust between private/public sectors.
concurrents.faiblesses: Limited updates since 2021 suggests slow scaling. Relies on donor funding and narrow telco data focus limits breadth.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: No major 2025-2026 developments found; ongoing mentions in Data-Pop Senegal projects (2024). Flowminder OPAL launched 2021 with Haiti pilot.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε industrialise l'approche code-to-data d'OPAL avec blockchain, tokenisation et revenue model, là où OPAL reste un projet académique sans échelle commerciale.

concurrents.type_donnees: Personal, health, gaming, music, IoT
concurrents.privacy: Encryption, secure vaults, planned ZK proofs/homomorphic encryption
concurrents.agent_fiduciaire: Data Coalition DAOs act as fiduciary agents; aggregate data, negotiate prices collectively, board bonds tokens for skin in game
concurrents.revenue_model: token, transaction fees (ITHEUM for NFT fees, gas fees)
concurrents.pricing: No specific numbers; ITHEUM token for fees, gas in EGLD/SOL etc.
concurrents.forces: Pioneering data NFT protocol enables personal data sovereignty and monetization; multi-chain with DAOs for collective bargaining and sector-specific (health/gaming) focus.
concurrents.faiblesses: Low token market cap (~$150K) indicates limited traction/adoption; complex privacy tech still in planning stages with no specific pricing transparency.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: 2025: Partnership with Walrus for AI/music data tokenization; Solana expansion with music NFTs, gaming data, 40% staking APR, 15% token burn; over 100k community members. [TheStreet Crypto](https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/press-releases/data-tokenization-protocol-itheum-partners-with-walrus), [Solana Compass](https://solanacompass.com/projects/itheum)
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε intègre compliance (ÆLYA), traçabilité (BURHAN) et gouvernance (NOOS) dans son protocole de données, là où Itheum n'est qu'un wrapper NFT avec $150K de market cap et aucune traction enterprise.

concurrents.modele: B2C marketplace protocol (privacy-preserving ads in Brave browser)
concurrents.type_donnees: Attention metrics, ad interactions, browsing interests (on-device)
concurrents.privacy: On-device processing, zero-knowledge proofs, tracker blocking, GDPR-compliant
concurrents.revenue_model: Token (30% platform fee on BAT ad transactions)
concurrents.pricing: Advertisers buy BAT for ads; BAT market price ~$0.17; Brave takes 30% cut
concurrents.forces: Privacy-focused ad ecosystem with rapid user growth to 100M+ MAU; innovative token rewards for users and creators.
concurrents.faiblesses: BAT utility growth lagging user base; limited geo-availability for rewards and regulatory crypto risks.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Brave Rewards 3.0 rollout with self-custody on Solana (2025); Brave Games Web3 competition launch (Jan 2026); surpassed 101M MAU (Nov 2025).
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε va au-delà de la compensation attention→token en intégrant l'économie de l'intention complète avec agent fiduciaire et données multi-verticales, là où BAT reste limité au navigateur web.

concurrents.type_donnees: personal (social, e-commerce, offline transactions)
concurrents.pricing: $3-5 per data sale; DXT ICO $0.18, now ~$0.00014
concurrents.forces: User data control/monetization; transparent marketplace disrupting brokers; blockchain immutability/consent [[TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2015/07/10/datawallet-seed-funding/), [Investopedia](https://www.investopedia.com/news/blockchain-could-make-you-owner-data-privacy-selling-purchase-history/)]
concurrents.faiblesses: Low adoption (negligible token volume); inactive post-2018, domain repurposed [[Coinfi](https://www.coinfi.com/coins/datawallet)]
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Negligible token activity; founder to new projects (Omni acquired 2024, Yield.xyz); no major 2025-2026 developments [[IQ.wiki](https://iq.wiki/wiki/serafin-lion-engel), [Coinfi](https://www.coinfi.com/coins/datawallet)]
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε est structurellement supérieur car il combine privacy avancée + agent fiduciaire + corridor Afrique + intégration enterprise EIGEN, là où DataWallet a échoué à construire un marché viable et semble inactif.

concurrents.type_donnees: real-time, IoT, DePIN, live media, geospatial
concurrents.revenue_model: token (DATA), protocol fees, node staking rewards
concurrents.pricing: DATA token ~$0.001; node sponsorships via tokens
concurrents.forces: Decentralized scalable real-time P2P data streaming with strong security via E2E encryption and signatures; supports AI, DePIN, live video without intermediaries.
concurrents.faiblesses: Low token market cap indicates limited adoption; complex for non-technical users with reliance on node operators and token volatility.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: 2025: Streamr 1.0 launched with complete DATA tokenomics; Q1-Q3 transparency reports show token sales ($457k Q1), protocol fees, new CEO appointed, StreamrTV for live broadcast, quantum-resistant security, trackerless network upgrades for scalability ([Streamr Blog](https://blog.streamr.network)).
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε ancre la souveraineté dans un agent fiduciaire légal et un corridor géopolitique concret, là où Streamr reste un protocole de streaming décentralisé sans modèle économique viable.

concurrents.funding_total: Grant from Surdna Foundation (2009), amount unknown; no VC funding found
concurrents.modele: Research project and open development community (protocol-like)
concurrents.type_donnees: Personal data (for sovereignty and VRM tools)
concurrents.privacy: Advanced: machine-readable personal privacy terms (MyTerms/IEEE P7012 standard), user-proffered contracts
concurrents.agent_fiduciaire: Yes: personal AI agents acting solely for the individual to proffer terms, sign agreements, manage relationships
concurrents.corridor_afrique: Absent (minor historical VRM company mentions in South Africa, no direct project presence)
concurrents.pricing: N/A
concurrents.forces: Pioneering personal data sovereignty and intention economy concepts; developing IEEE MyTerms standard for user-controlled privacy contracts, enabling fiduciary agents.
concurrents.faiblesses: No commercial products or significant funding; remains conceptual/research-focused after 20 years with limited mainstream adoption.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: IEEE P7012 (MyTerms) standard nearing publication in early 2026 for machine-readable personal privacy terms; ongoing VRM Day/IIW events; integrations with personal AI agents and protocols like AT Protocol, Nostr; Consumer Reports involvement (2025).
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε industrialise la vision VRM de Doc Searls avec blockchain, agent fiduciaire et économie tokenisée, là où ProjectVRM reste un projet de recherche Harvard sans implémentation commerciale après 20 ans.
concurrents.sources: [ProjectVRM About](https://projectvrm.org/about/), [ProjectVRM Research](https://projectvrm.org/projects/), [Berkman Klein ProjectVRM](https://cyber.harvard.edu/projectvrm), [Wikipedia Doc Searls](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Doc_Searls), [ProjectVRM Blog Posts 2025-2026](https://projectvrm.org), [ProjectVRM MyTerms Updates](https://projectvrm.org/2025/04/), [ProjectVRM Development](https://projectvrm.org/development/)

concurrents.type_donnees: Personal behavioral (social, finance, health, location, lifestyle)
concurrents.corridor_afrique: Present (users in South Africa, Kenya, Nigeria, etc.)
concurrents.pricing: Pay-as-you-survey to tailor-made plans; no specific numbers
concurrents.forces: Pioneering ethical zero-party data platform with on-device AI; scaled to 500k users; builds trust and high engagement for businesses and users.
concurrents.faiblesses: Limited funding scale; service paused for pivot to DataSapien SDK; lacks pricing transparency.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Team pivoted to DataSapien in 2024; DataSapien launched device-native AI platform beta (Dec 2025); enterprise SDK for panels (Mar 2026) [[CitizenMe About](https://citizenme.com/about/)](https://citizenme.com/about/), [[DataSapien](https://datasapien.com)](https://datasapien.com), [[IT Brief](https://itbrief.co.uk/story/datasapien-unveils-ai-platform-for-secure-cloud-free-mobile-apps)](https://itbrief.co.uk/story/datasapien-unveils-ai-platform-for-secure-cloud-free-mobile-apps), [[MrWeb](https://www.mrweb.com/drno/news39593.htm)](https://www.mrweb.com/drno/news39593.htm)
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε va au-delà du zero-party data avec tokenisation blockchain et corridor Afrique-EU, là où CitizenMe a pivoté vers DataSapien en abandonnant son modèle original de marketplace de données personnelles.

concurrents.type_donnees: Personal (identity, financial, social, health, IoT)
concurrents.privacy: Privacy/Security by Design, AES-256-GCM encryption per user, GDPR compliant
concurrents.pricing: Not publicly available
concurrents.forces: Pioneering privacy-focused personal data platform with strong security (ISO27001, MyData awards); flexible ledger-agnostic DLT integration for SSI and verifiable credentials.
concurrents.faiblesses: Limited funding and scale compared to larger players; low public visibility on recent revenue/pricing details.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Selected for 2025 KickStart Innovation program in Switzerland (Sep 2025) to partner with corps like Swisscom, AXA on digital identity pilots ahead of e-ID Act vote.[Meeco News](https://www.meeco.me/news/meeco-selected-for-europes-premier-kickstart-innovation-program-2025)
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε combine l'approche souveraineté de Meeco avec blockchain, agent fiduciaire et corridor Afrique-EU dans un protocole productif, là où Meeco reste un outil B2B2C sans marché de données ni tokenisation.

concurrents.modele: B2B protocol (enterprise Solid servers and services)
concurrents.type_donnees: Personal (profile, contacts, financial, health, travel)
concurrents.privacy: User-controlled Pods with granular access permissions
concurrents.pricing: Not publicly available
concurrents.forces: Pioneered by Web inventor Tim Berners-Lee; enables true personal data sovereignty through decentralized Pods, fostering trust and interoperability.
concurrents.faiblesses: Limited adoption and ecosystem maturity; relies on enterprise uptake for growth, with no recent major funding or valuation updates.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Inrupt migrating inrupt.net service to PodSpaces (March 2025); integrating Solid with Anthropic's MCP for Agentic Wallets (May 2025); potential collaboration with Project Liberty (March 2025).
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε opérationnalise la vision de Solid avec un modèle économique concret (tokenisation, agent fiduciaire, corridor Afrique-EU), là où Solid reste un protocole académique sans adoption de masse après 8 ans.

concurrents.type_donnees: Personal, IoT
concurrents.privacy: Edge computing (data stays on device), GDPR compliant
concurrents.agent_fiduciaire: Yes, cooperative represents users, profit sharing, one-member-one-vote
concurrents.revenue_model: Transaction percentage via cooperative, freemium shares
concurrents.pricing: Co-op shares €5-€500; no specific data pricing found
concurrents.forces: Empowers users with data control and earnings; cost savings/GDPR compliance for businesses; sustainable edge computing.
concurrents.faiblesses: Low visibility/adoption; no recent developments; lacks major funding or scaling evidence.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: No major news in 2025-2026; low activity post-2022.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε est structurellement supérieur car il combine edge computing + blockchain + agent fiduciaire + corridor Afrique + intégration EIGEN, là où Polypoly est une coopérative allemande quasi-inactive sans traction ni financement.

concurrents.type_donnees: Personal: social, financial, health, wearables [Digi.me site](https://digi.me/), [CBInsights](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/digime)
concurrents.privacy: Privacy-by-design, user-controlled encrypted local storage, no central holding, consent contracts, GDPR [UK Gov response](https://assets.publishing.service.gov.uk/media/5d762aa6e5274a09ae3069bc/190806_digi_me_response_to_SoS_-_non-confidential.pdf), ISO 27001 via WDX
concurrents.agent_fiduciaire: No, data facilitator for user-controlled sharing
concurrents.revenue_model: Transaction fees from businesses ($0.10/share, $3 cap/user/year) [UK Gov response](https://assets.publishing.service.gov.uk/media/5d762aa6e5274a09ae3069bc/190806_digi_me_response_to_SoS_-_non-confidential.pdf)
concurrents.pricing: $0.10 per data share to businesses, capped $3/user/year
concurrents.forces: Enables user data sovereignty with strong privacy; rich consented data for businesses; health data focus (Dutch PGO)
concurrents.faiblesses: Small scale (est. $1M revenue, 12 employees); low visibility post-acquisition [Growjo](https://growjo.com/company/Digi.me)
concurrents.news_2025_2026: App updates Oct 2025 for Dutch health records (Patient Summary, measurements) [Digi.me](https://digi.me/new); acquired by World Data Exchange Oct 2022 [CBInsights](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/digime)
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε transforme les données personnelles en actif économique via agent fiduciaire et tokenisation, là où Digi.me n'est qu'un agrégateur de données en mode consent-as-a-service sans retour financier à l'individu.

concurrents.type_donnees: Personal data
concurrents.agent_fiduciaire: No specific model; promotes human-centric data operators/intermediaries
concurrents.corridor_afrique: Present (members/founding members from Africa, 6 continents coverage)
concurrents.pricing: Membership fees (target 200k EUR/year); specific tiers not found
concurrents.forces: Global community of 100+ org/400+ individual members across 40+ countries; influences EU data policy (Data Spaces, EHDS); annual conferences since 2016.[MyData.org](https://mydata.org)
concurrents.faiblesses: Limited funding reliance on memberships/grants; primarily Europe/Nordic-focused projects despite global reach.[MyData Strategy](https://mydata.org/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/MyData-Global-Strategy-2024-2026-Final-version-for-AGM.pdf)
concurrents.news_2025_2026: MyData 2025 conference (Sep 2025, 10th anniversary); EGM 2026 for new Declaration (Jan 2026); AGM 2025 (May); Strategy 2024-2026 emphasizes policy/market impact.[Conference](https://conference.mydata.org), [AGM2025](https://mydata.org/mydata-event/mydata-global-annual-general-meeting-2025/)
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε implémente les principes MyData dans un protocole blockchain avec revenue model et corridor géopolitique, là où MyData Global reste un mouvement associatif sans produit commercial.

concurrents.modele: B2B2C platform (personal data accounts service for individuals and enterprises)
concurrents.type_donnees: Personal, financial, health, IoT
concurrents.privacy: Self-sovereign data with full IP ownership, GDPR compliant, zero-PII options
concurrents.agent_fiduciaire: HAT Community Foundation regulates as guardian shareholder enforcing fiduciary duty for public benefit
concurrents.corridor_afrique: Present (Kuza OneNetwork partnership for agri finance in Africa)
concurrents.pricing: $0.10 per PDA user/month (80% rebates for 100k+ users); data wallet licensing
concurrents.forces: Pioneering self-sovereign data infrastructure from $50M+ UK research; enables secure data portability and value creation while maintaining user control.
concurrents.faiblesses: Limited scale and funding compared to big tech; adoption challenged by centralized data incumbents.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Jan 2025: US patent issued for HAT Microservers. 2025: GLEIF vLEI Hackathon recognition; Kuza partnership for Africa/Asia agri finance; 2025 Year in Review emphasizes digital trust ecosystems.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε combine la portabilité HAT avec agent fiduciaire, blockchain et corridor Afrique-EU dans un protocole productif, là où HAT reste un conteneur de données académique sans adoption commerciale significative.

concurrents.annee_creation: N/A — Entité non trouvée en tant que data company
concurrents.type_donnees: N/A
concurrents.corridor_afrique: N/A — Aucune data company marocaine nommée 'MiDA' identifiée. Le Maroc a ID&A Tech (fintech data), GEOAP (SpaceTech/GIS), et des startups fintech mais aucun data marketplace souverain.
concurrents.pricing: N/A
concurrents.forces: Le terrain est vierge au Maroc pour un data marketplace souverain — aucun concurrent direct identifié.
concurrents.faiblesses: L'absence même de concurrent confirme le manque d'infrastructure data sovereignty au Maroc, ce qui représente à la fois un risque (marché non éduqué) et une opportunité (first-mover advantage).
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Le Maroc a lancé sa stratégie Digital 2030, le Morocco Fintech Center (jan 2025), et un véhicule d'investissement de 2.5Mds MAD pour les startups. Terrain fertile pour MYNε.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε est structurellement supérieur car aucun concurrent marocain ne combine marketplace de données + blockchain + agent fiduciaire + corridor EU-Afrique — le terrain est vierge.
concurrents.sources: Recherche exhaustive sur F6S, Charika.ma, Crunchbase, LinkedIn. MiDA = Moroccan Interior Design Awards (non-pertinent).

concurrents.type_donnees: Consumer/market research, consumer behavior, economic indicators, retail, brand performance, socioeconomics, health, finance
concurrents.privacy: basic GDPR (anonymous aggregated data sharing, no PII without consent)
concurrents.corridor_afrique: 21 African countries including Kenya, Nigeria, South Africa, Ghana, Ivory Coast, Cameroon, Tanzania, Ethiopia, Egypt, Senegal, Malawi; sectors: FMCG, finance/banking, retail, media, tech/telecom, health/wellness
concurrents.revenue_model: SaaS, freemium (30-day free trial of Kasi Edge platform)
concurrents.pricing: 30-day free trial; specific pricing not publicly listed
concurrents.forces: Leading provider of real-time, aggregated consumer and market data across 21 African markets from primary surveys (120k+ interviews/year, 80M+ data points); AI-powered platform (Kasi AI) tailored to African contexts with partnerships like Bloomberg, UN-Habitat.
concurrents.faiblesses: Limited disclosed funding may constrain scaling; small team size (2-10 employees) relative to continental ambitions.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Launched Kasi AI at AMC 2025 powered by 100M+ African data points; CEO awarded Entrepreneurship Excellence at Africa Day Canada 2025; partnered with UN-Habitat for urban innovation and Strathmore iLab; released State of the Consumer Report 2025 for Kenya; hosted events in Uganda/Zambia/Nairobi (2025).
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε permet aux individus africains de posséder et monétiser leurs propres données via agent fiduciaire, là où Kasi Insight extrait la valeur des consommateurs africains pour la revendre aux corporates sans retour.

concurrents.modele: B2B (full-service mobile survey platform for organizations, brands, governments)
concurrents.type_donnees: consumer/market research (surveys on consumer behavior, health, finance, food security, media, etc.)
concurrents.privacy: basic GDPR, CCPA compliance, encryption, consent-based, data minimization
concurrents.corridor_afrique: Strong presence across Africa (offices in Kenya, Nigeria, South Africa, Tanzania, DRC; coverage in 80+ countries including Ghana, Uganda, Ethiopia, Rwanda; sectors: finance, health, agriculture, media, consumer goods)
concurrents.pricing: Starts at $3 per completed survey (2018, varies by factors); respondent incentives ~$0.50; custom quotes
concurrents.forces: Pioneer in mobile surveys in emerging markets with massive scale (300M+ users, 5M+ surveys/year), strong Africa ops, AI-enhanced quality and speed.
concurrents.faiblesses: Limited recent public funding info (last known 2013), some user complaints on payments in reviews.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: 2025-2026: AI integration for research enhancement; reports on financial landscape SSA, Gen Z protests Kenya, smartphone/social media usage Africa, Gender Equality 2026; launched Senselytic AI tool.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε transforme les répondants en propriétaires de leurs données via blockchain et tokenisation, là où GeoPoll les rémunère $0.50 par survey et revend leurs insights à prix premium.

concurrents.modele: B2B CPaaS platform providing communication APIs (SMS, USSD, Voice, Payments, Airtime)
concurrents.type_donnees: Personal (name, phone, email, address, payment info), device/IP, usage data
concurrents.privacy: Basic: compliance with applicable data laws, security measures, staff training; no advanced tech like DP/ZK/HE
concurrents.corridor_afrique: Pan-African coverage in 20-23 countries; telecom, fintech, developer ecosystem; partners MTN, Safaricom, Airtel
concurrents.pricing: Usage-based: e.g. ~KSh 0.8/SMS in Kenya (~$0.006), $0.01 base/SMS; varies by country/service
concurrents.forces: Leading African CPaaS with easy APIs, broad MNO integration (80+), scalable for devs/startups/enterprises.
concurrents.faiblesses: Primarily developer-oriented (steep for non-devs); Africa telco-limited; no funding since 2021.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Key USSD infra for Machankura Bitcoin wallet (10 countries, $1.2M vol Mar 2026); platform billing/TOS updates. No major funding/news.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε est un marketplace de données souveraines avec privacy-by-design et agent fiduciaire, là où Africa's Talking n'est qu'une plateforme CPaaS (SMS/USSD) sans aucune composante data sovereignty.

concurrents.type_donnees: Consumer behavioral, demographic, telco, lifestyle, transactional data
concurrents.privacy: Basic GDPR and NDPR compliance, data anonymization, encryption
concurrents.corridor_afrique: Nigeria (HQ), Kenya, Ghana, South Africa, Egypt; sectors: marketing tech, financial services, FMCG, telco
concurrents.revenue_model: SaaS subscriptions, per-message/API/call fees, data monetization
concurrents.pricing: Starter: Free; Growth: $40/mo; Pro: $325/mo; Enterprise: Custom; Data enrichment: $0.06/API call; SMS: $0.005/msg; WhatsApp: $0.034/msg; Survey: $1.3/response
concurrents.forces: Pioneer in African mobile data marketing with 100M+ profiles, strong telco partnerships (e.g. MTN), ISO 27001/GDPR/NDPR compliant, AI-driven CDP for personalized engagement.
concurrents.faiblesses: Limited public info on recent funding/valuation; dependent on telco data partnerships; no advanced privacy tech like ZK or homomorphic encryption; competition from global martech giants entering Africa.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Ongoing Pan-African expansion using 2023 $9M Series B funding; ISO 27001, GDPR/NDPR compliance highlighted; estimated $9.8M annual revenue (2025 profiles); recruitment drive (2026). No major 2025-2026 events found beyond continued growth focus.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε est structurellement supérieur par sa combinaison unique de souveraineté des données + agent fiduciaire + blockchain + corridor Afrique-EU + intégration EIGEN.

concurrents.type_donnees: Real-world evidence, EHR-derived clinical oncology data
concurrents.pricing: Not publicly disclosed
concurrents.forces: Pioneering oncology RWE platform with >5M patient records and AI curation, deep biopharma/provider partnerships accelerating R&D and evidence generation.
concurrents.faiblesses: Primarily US-focused data limiting global generalizability, challenges in EHR data quality and curation from unstructured sources.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Dec 2025: Sold clinical research business to Paradigm Health with strategic partnership ([PRNewswire](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/paradigm-health-acquires-flatiron-healths-clinical-research-business-and-forms-strategic-partnership-to-rebuild-clinical-research-ecosystem-302632923.html)); Mar 2026: Abbott Precision Oncology integrated into OncoEMR; Research at ASH 2025/ASCO GU 2026 on blood/prostate cancers; New global Panoramic datasets.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε donne au patient le contrôle de ses données oncologiques via agent fiduciaire et blockchain, là où Flatiron extrait les données cliniques des hôpitaux pour enrichir Roche sans aucun retour au patient.

concurrents.type_donnees: clinical trial data, real-world evidence, patient-reported outcomes, sensor data
concurrents.pricing: Enterprise/site-based; not publicly disclosed (~$1000+/month estimates for CTMS)
concurrents.forces: Largest clinical dataset (>38k trials), unified AI platform accelerates trials, decentralization leader
concurrents.faiblesses: High cost for small firms, steep learning curve
concurrents.news_2025_2026: AI Study Build for faster trials; partnerships with Menarini (oncology), CRIO (2.5k sites); SCOPE award for Protocol Optimization; 120+ AI studies in 2025
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε est structurellement supérieur car il combine souveraineté des données patient + agent fiduciaire + blockchain + corridor Afrique, là où Medidata est un SaaS de trial management à $5.8B qui ne résout pas la propriété des données.

concurrents.type_donnees: clinical, genomic, real-world evidence, EHR, imaging
concurrents.pricing: Data rentals per records needed; genetic tests ~$295; custom based on needs (no public per-query/API specifics)
concurrents.forces: Vast multimodal dataset (45M+ de-identified records); strong growth in diagnostics (111% YoY) and data licensing; AI-enabled precision medicine platform.
concurrents.faiblesses: Ongoing net losses despite revenue growth; high cash burn; early-stage AI revenue (<2% of total); reimbursement risks for new tests.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Q4/FY 2025 revenue $1.27B (+83% YoY); Merck collaboration (Mar 2026) for AI precision medicine; FDA clearances for ECG-AF, xR IVD; HRD-RNA algorithm launch; partnerships with Median Technologies, Daiichi Sankyo, NYU Langone.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε permet au patient de tokeniser et monétiser ses données génomiques/cliniques, là où Tempus accumule 45M+ dossiers dé-identifiés pour son propre profit sans souveraineté individuelle.

concurrents.type_donnees: EHR, clinical, claims, real-world evidence (RWE), genomics
concurrents.pricing: Subscription-based; custom datasets (no public specifics); consulting $180/hr
concurrents.forces: Largest federated global RWD network (280M+ patients); AI-powered analytics reducing trial costs/time; HIPAA/GDPR compliant with strong growth in citations/publications.
concurrents.faiblesses: Funding details inconsistent across sources; limited transparency on pricing/revenue; reliance on HCO data contributions.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Jan 2026: Announced conversational AI interface and enhanced API for 2026. Oct 2025: Most cited RWD source (>2,000 PubMed citations). Sep 2025: Top 25 Healthcare Software Companies.
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε combine souveraineté patient + blockchain + corridor Afrique dans un protocole ouvert, là où TriNetX fédère les données de 280M+ patients sans leur donner voix au chapitre.

concurrents.valorisation: Public company; market cap ~$30B; analyst fair value $270/share
concurrents.type_donnees: Clinical trial data, real-world evidence (RWE), patient journey data, lab results, imaging, ePRO
concurrents.privacy: Basic GDPR/HIPAA; de-identification methods (e.g., SafeMine link-then-de-identify)
concurrents.agent_fiduciaire: No; Public Benefit Corporation balancing stakeholder interests
concurrents.corridor_afrique: Present (OpenData covers Middle East, North Africa, Sub-Saharan Africa)
concurrents.pricing: Subscription per user ~$100-200/month (CRM/Vault); custom enterprise deals
concurrents.forces: Industry-leading life sciences cloud software; high retention (120%+ NRR); strong growth in Vault CRM and AI agents.
concurrents.faiblesses: Premium pricing; dependency on Salesforce transition complete in 2025; competition from Salesforce Agentforce.
concurrents.news_2025_2026: Q4 FY2026 revenue $836M (+16% YoY); 125+ Vault CRM customers live incl. top biopharmas; Veeva AI agents launched; IQVIA partnership; eSource launch planned H2 2026. [Veeva IR](https://ir.veeva.com), [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com)
concurrents.myne_superiorite: MYNε démocratise l'accès aux données de santé via protocole ouvert et corridor Afrique, là où Veeva est un SaaS fermé à $30B de market cap qui verrouille les données dans son cloud propriétaire.
